words.exampleArabic: يُهَدِّدُ تَغَيُّرُ الْمَنَاخِ التَّوَازُنَ الْبِيئِيَّ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ.
words.exampleBs: Klimatske promjene prijete ekološkoj ravnoteži na Zemlji.
words.exampleEn: Climate change threatens the ecological balance on Earth.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَبِّبُ الِاحْتِبَاسُ الْحَرَارِيُّ ذَوَبَانَ الْجُلَيِّدَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Globalno zagrijavanje uzrokuje topljenje ledenjaka.
words.exampleEn: Global warming causes the melting of glaciers.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الدُّوَلُ إِلَى تَقْلِيلِ انْبِعَاثَاتِ الْكَرْبُونِ.
words.exampleBs: Države nastoje smanjiti emisije ugljika.
words.exampleEn: Countries strive to reduce carbon emissions.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْبِسُ غَازَاتُ الدَّفِيئَةِ الْحَرَارَةَ فِي الْغِلَافِ الْجَوِّيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Staklenički plinovi zarobljavaju toplinu u atmosferi.
words.exampleEn: Greenhouse gases trap heat in the atmosphere.

words.exampleArabic: تُشَكِّلُ إِزَالَةُ الْغَابَاتِ تَهْدِيدًا كَبِيرًا لِلتَّنَوُّعِ الْبِيئِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Krčenje šuma predstavlja veliku prijetnju biološkoj raznolikosti.
words.exampleEn: Deforestation poses a major threat to biodiversity.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ التَّصَحُّرُ عَلَى مَلَايِينِ الْهِكْتَارَاتِ سَنَوِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Dezertifikacija godišnje pogađa milione hektara.
words.exampleEn: Desertification affects millions of hectares annually.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّى الْجَفَافُ الطَّوِيلُ إِلَى نَقْصٍ حَادٍّ فِي الْمَحَاصِيلِ.
words.exampleBs: Dugotrajna suša dovela je do ozbiljnog nedostatka usjeva.
words.exampleEn: The prolonged drought led to a severe shortage of crops.

words.exampleArabic: دَمَّرَ الْفَيَضَانُ الْعَارِمُ الْقُرَى الْمُجَاوِرَةَ.
words.exampleBs: Razorna poplava uništila je susjedna sela.
words.exampleEn: The devastating flood destroyed the neighbouring villages.

words.exampleArabic: ضَرَبَ زِلْزَالٌ عَنِيفٌ الْمَدِينَةَ فِي سَاعَةٍ مُبَكِّرَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Snažan zemljotres pogodio je grad u ranim satima.
words.exampleEn: A powerful earthquake struck the city in the early hours.

words.exampleArabic: اجْتَاحَ التَّسُونَامِي الشَّوَاطِئَ وَخَلَّفَ دَمَارًا هَائِلًا.
words.exampleBs: Cunami je preplavio obale ostavljajući golemo razaranje.
words.exampleEn: The tsunami swept the coasts leaving massive destruction.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ التَّوَازُنُ الطَّبِيعِيُّ عَلَى التَّنَوُّعِ الْبِيئِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Prirodna ravnoteža ovisi o biološkoj raznolikosti.
words.exampleEn: The natural balance depends on biodiversity.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْمَلُ مُنَظَّمَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ عَلَى حِمَايَةِ الْأَنْوَاعِ الْمُهَدَّدَةِ بِالِانْقِرَاضِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnoge organizacije rade na zaštiti ugroženih vrsta.
words.exampleEn: Many organisations work to protect endangered species.

words.exampleArabic: تُوَفِّرُ الْمَحْمِيَّةُ الطَّبِيعِيَّةُ مَلْجَأً آمِنًا لِلْحَيَوَانَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Prirodni rezervat pruža sigurno utočište za životinje.
words.exampleEn: The wildlife reserve provides a safe haven for animals.

words.exampleArabic: تَهْدِفُ التَّنْمِيَةُ الْمُسْتَدَامَةُ إِلَى تَلْبِيَةِ احْتِيَاجَاتِ الْأَجْيَالِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Održivi razvoj ima za cilj zadovoljiti potrebe budućih generacija.
words.exampleEn: Sustainable development aims to meet the needs of future generations.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ الطَّاقَةُ الْمُتَجَدِّدَةُ بَدِيلًا نَظِيفًا لِلْوُقُودِ الْأَحْفُورِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Obnovljiva energija smatra se čistom alternativom fosilnim gorivima.
words.exampleEn: Renewable energy is considered a clean alternative to fossil fuels.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الطَّاقَةُ الشَّمْسِيَّةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ فِي الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Solarna energija se brzo širi u arapskim zemljama.
words.exampleEn: Solar power is spreading rapidly in Arab countries.

words.exampleArabic: تُوَلِّدُ طَاقَةُ الرِّيَاحِ الْكَهْرَبَاءَ دُونَ تَلْوِيثِ الْبِيئَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Energija vjetra proizvodi struju bez zagađivanja okoliša.
words.exampleEn: Wind energy generates electricity without polluting the environment.

words.exampleArabic: تُسَاهِمُ إِعَادَةُ التَّدْوِيرِ فِي تَقْلِيلِ النُّفَايَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Recikliranje doprinosi smanjenju otpada.
words.exampleEn: Recycling contributes to reducing waste.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَبِّبُ تَلَوُّثُ الْهَوَاءِ أَمْرَاضًا تَنَفُّسِيَّةً خَطِيرَةً.
words.exampleBs: Zagađenje zraka uzrokuje ozbiljne bolesti dišnog sustava.
words.exampleEn: Air pollution causes serious respiratory diseases.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْقَسِمُ الْكُرَةُ الْأَرْضِيَّةُ إِلَى سَبْعِ قَارَّاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zemlja je podijeljena na sedam kontinenata.
words.exampleEn: The Earth is divided into seven continents.

words.exampleArabic: تَقَعُ الْمَمْلَكَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ السُّعُودِيَّةُ فِي شِبْهِ جَزِيرَةٍ كَبِيرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Saudijska Arabija se nalazi na velikom poluotoku.
words.exampleEn: Saudi Arabia is located on a large peninsula.

words.exampleArabic: تَمْتَدُّ الْهَضْبَةُ عَلَى مَسَافَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ فِي الْقَلْبِ الْإِفْرِيقِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Visoravan se prostire na dugoj udaljenosti u srcu Afrike.
words.exampleEn: The plateau stretches over a long distance in the heart of Africa.

words.exampleArabic: يَفْصِلُ الْمَضِيقُ بَيْنَ الْقَارَّتَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Tjesnac razdvaja dva kontinenta.
words.exampleEn: The strait separates the two continents.

words.exampleArabic: يَذُوبُ الْجُلَيِّدُ بِمُعَدَّلٍ مُتَسَارِعٍ بِسَبَبِ الِاحْتِبَاسِ الْحَرَارِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Ledenjak se topi ubrzanim tempom zbog globalnog zagrijavanja.
words.exampleEn: The glacier melts at an accelerating rate due to global warming.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الشَّعَبُ الْمَرْجَانِيُّ مَوْطِنًا لِآلَافِ الْأَنْوَاعِ الْبَحْرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Koraljni greben dom je tisućama morskih vrsta.
words.exampleEn: The coral reef is home to thousands of marine species.

words.exampleArabic: تَعِيشُ قُطْعَانٌ ضَخْمَةٌ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ فِي السَّافَانَا الْأَفْرِيقِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Velika stada životinja žive u afričkoj savani.
words.exampleEn: Large herds of animals live in the African savanna.

words.exampleArabic: تُنْتِجُ الْغَابَةُ الْمَطِيرَةُ جُزْءًا كَبِيرًا مِنْ أُكْسِجِينِ الْعَالَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Kišna šuma proizvodi veliki dio kisika na planeti.
words.exampleEn: The rainforest produces a large portion of the world's oxygen.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَمِيَّزُ التُّنْدْرَا بِمَنَاخِهَا الْبَارِدِ وَتُرْبَتِهَا الْمُتَجَمِّدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Tundra se odlikuje hladnom klimom i smrznutim tlom.
words.exampleEn: The tundra is characterised by its cold climate and frozen soil.

words.exampleArabic: شَاهَدَ النَّاسُ الْكُسُوفَ الشَّمْسِيَّ بِدَهْشَةٍ وَإِعْجَابٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ljudi su s divljenjem promatrali pomračenje sunca.
words.exampleEn: People watched the solar eclipse with awe and wonder.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَأَثَّرُ الْمَدُّ وَالْجَزْرُ بِجَاذِبِيَّةِ الْقَمَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Plima i oseka su pod utjecajem privlačne sile Mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: Tides are influenced by the gravitational pull of the moon.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّى الِانْفِجَارُ الْبُرْكَانِيُّ إِلَى نُزُوحِ آلَافِ السُّكَّانِ.
words.exampleBs: Vulkanska erupcija uzrokovala je raseljavanje hiljada stanovnika.
words.exampleEn: The volcanic eruption caused the displacement of thousands of residents.

words.exampleArabic: أَغْلَقَ الِانْهِيَارُ الثَّلْجِيُّ الطَّرِيقَ الْجَبَلِيَّ لِأَيَّامٍ.
words.exampleBs: Lavina je zatvorila planinski put na nekoliko dana.
words.exampleEn: The avalanche blocked the mountain road for several days.

words.exampleArabic: اجْتَاحَ الْإِعْصَارُ الْمِنْطَقَةَ وَأَلْحَقَ أَضْرَارًا جَسِيمَةً.
words.exampleBs: Tornado je pohario područje nanijevši veliku štetu.
words.exampleEn: The tornado swept through the region causing severe damage.

words.exampleArabic: تَرْتَفِعُ الرُّطُوبَةُ فِي الْمَنَاطِقِ الِاسْتِوَائِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlažnost se povećava u tropskim predjelima.
words.exampleEn: Humidity rises in tropical regions.

words.exampleArabic: يَنْخَفِضُ الضَّغْطُ الْجَوِّيُّ كُلَّمَا ارْتَفَعْنَا إِلَى أَعْلَى.
words.exampleBs: Atmosferski pritisak opada kako se penjemo više.
words.exampleEn: Atmospheric pressure decreases the higher we climb.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ النِّظَامُ الْبِيئِيُّ مِنْ كَائِنَاتٍ حَيَّةٍ وَبِيئَتِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Ekosistem se sastoji od živih bića i njihovog okoliša.
words.exampleEn: An ecosystem consists of living organisms and their environment.

words.exampleArabic: تَرْتَبِطُ الْكَائِنَاتُ الْحَيَّةُ بِبَعْضِهَا عَبْرَ السِّلْسِلَةِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Živa bića međusobno su povezana kroz hranidbeni lanac.
words.exampleEn: Living organisms are connected to each other through the food chain.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ الْحَيَوَانُ عَلَى مَوْطِنِهِ الطَّبِيعِيِّ لِلْبَقَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Životinja ovisi o svom prirodnom staništu za preživljavanje.
words.exampleEn: The animal depends on its natural habitat for survival.

words.exampleArabic: يُهَدِّدُ النَّشَاطُ الْبَشَرِيُّ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْأَنْوَاعِ بِالِانْقِرَاضِ.
words.exampleBs: Ljudska aktivnost prijeti izumiranjem mnogih vrsta.
words.exampleEn: Human activity threatens many species with extinction.

words.exampleArabic: تَقْطَعُ الطُّيُورُ مَسَافَاتٍ شَاسِعَةً خِلَالَ هِجْرَتِهَا السَّنَوِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ptice prelaze ogromne razdaljine tokom godišnje migracije.
words.exampleEn: Birds cover vast distances during their annual migration.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَرَبَّصُ الْمُفْتَرِسُ بِفَرِيسَتِهِ بِصَبْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Grabljivac strpljivo vreba svoju žrtvu.
words.exampleEn: The predator patiently stalks its prey.

words.exampleArabic: أَفْلَتَتِ الْفَرِيسَةُ مِنَ الْمُفْتَرِسِ بِسُرْعَتِهَا الْفَائِقَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Plijen je pobjegao grabljivcu zahvaljujući svojoj izuzetnoj brzini.
words.exampleEn: The prey escaped from the predator thanks to its remarkable speed.

words.exampleArabic: تَجْتَاحُ الْعَوَاصِفُ الرَّمْلِيَّةُ الْمَنَاطِقَ الصَّحْرَاوِيَّةَ بِانْتِظَامٍ.
words.exampleBs: Pješčane oluje redovito pustoše pustinjska područja.
words.exampleEn: Sandstorms regularly sweep through desert regions.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْمِي الطَّبَقَةُ الْأُوزُونِيَّةُ الْأَرْضَ مِنَ الْأَشِعَّةِ الضَّارَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ozonski omotač štiti Zemlju od štetnih zraka.
words.exampleEn: The ozone layer protects the Earth from harmful radiation.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ اسْتِغْلَالُ الْمَصَادِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ بِصُورَةٍ مَسْؤُولَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Prirodne resurse treba koristiti na odgovoran način.
words.exampleEn: Natural resources must be exploited in a responsible manner.

words.exampleArabic: يَخْتَلِفُ الْمُنَاخُ اخْتِلَافًا كَبِيرًا بَيْنَ مَنَاطِقِ الْعَالَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Klima se znatno razlikuje između pojedinih dijelova svijeta.
words.exampleEn: The climate varies greatly between different regions of the world.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَبِّبُ التَّآكُلُ فُقْدَانَ التُّرْبَةِ الْخَصِبَةِ تَدْرِيجِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Erozija postepeno uzrokuje gubitak plodnog tla.
words.exampleEn: Erosion gradually causes the loss of fertile soil.

words.exampleArabic: يُنْتِجُ الطُّحْلُبُ كَمِّيَّاتٍ ضَخْمَةً مِنَ الْأُكْسِجِينِ فِي الْمُحِيطَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Alge proizvode ogromne količine kisika u oceanima.
words.exampleEn: Algae produce vast amounts of oxygen in the oceans.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَدِّي حَرْقُ الْوُقُودِ الْأَحْفُورِيِّ إِلَى تَلْوِيثِ الْهَوَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Sagorijevanje fosilnih goriva dovodi do zagađenja zraka.
words.exampleEn: Burning fossil fuels leads to air pollution.
